absorption_derivations_recorded_cited.additive_characterization: for c = a +/- b, a parent reflection shifts the child phenomenon by delta = +/-(u_p/2)*D, a power of two; commutation holds iff delta is a lattice multiple at the child's (q+1)-scale - the 2^(E_parent - E_child) characterization. CITED: Amendment-2 ruling.
absorption_derivations_recorded_cited.lattice_equivariance_lemma: if delta = x' - x is an integer multiple of the (q+1)-quantum of x's (unchanged) binade, then RN_{q+1}(x + delta) = RN_{q+1}(x) + delta - translation by lattice vectors commutes with rounding. CITED: Will's Amendment-2 ruling 2026-06-11 + authority section 1 (grid structure); not re-derived here.
absorption_derivations_recorded_cited.multiplicative_characterization: scaling by an exact power of two commutes with RN (RN(2^k x) = 2^k RN(x)); multiplicative absorption follows the power-of-two characterization. CITED: Amendment-2 ruling.
absorption_derivations_recorded_cited.role: these derivations FALSIFIED the fireside biconditional's converse pre-freeze; the commutation criterion is the operational, derivation-independent test the graders use.

amendment_v2_2026_06_11.classification: transcription-fidelity correction GRANTED (bigraded Stage-A precedent): the v1 manifest transcribed DEVIATES in the s-form; the brief's binding text is the account form. v1 pin preserved (manifest_sha256_v1.pin); v1 verdicts preserved (records/verdicts_v1_sform.json) as Stage C's first finding.
amendment_v2_2026_06_11.code_bug_disclosure: pre-ruling, disclosed, accepted: _commutes baseline corrected from s_q to RN_{q+1}(x_n); the FAILs survived the fix.
amendment_v2_2026_06_11.divergence_algebra_derived_cited: define s_dev := s'_{q+1} - free_pred and e_dev := e'_{q+1} - (e_q - (u_q/2)*D). Two lines: e'_{q+1} = x' - s'_{q+1}; e_q - (u/2)*D = x - free_pred. Subtract: e_dev = (x' - x) - (s'_{q+1} - free_pred) = delta - s_dev, with delta = x' - x. FORCED ANATOMY: absorbed => s_dev = delta, e_dev = 0 (reading relocates in lockstep, account untouched); frozen-reading => s_dev = 0, e_dev = delta (reading holds, account absorbs the shift). CITED: Will's ruling 2026-06-11.
amendment_v2_2026_06_11.domain_note: the Stage-A s-form/e-form equivalence is CERTIFIED FOR FIXED PHENOMENA ONLY (x fixed in the Stage-A batteries by construction); on shifted phenomena the forms diverge by exactly e_dev = delta - s_dev. Regime-limited equivalences carry their domain (glossary section-13 pair drafted in the Stage-C report).
amendment_v2_2026_06_11.s_deviation_routing: the s-deviation set is routed to OBSERVATIONAL as reading-relocation events (real quantity, not the registered one).

authority: covariance note section 3 + Will's Amendment-2 ruling (fee1614) + authority section 1
date_approved: 2026-06-11 (Will's GO under Brief Amendment 2; binding order: manifest first)

definitions_frozen.ABSORBED: closure-node n is absorbed at step q iff x'_n != x_n AND RN_{q+1}(x'_n) - RN_{q+1}(x_n) == x'_n - x_n (the COMMUTATION CRITERION; equivalently e'(q+1) == e(q+1)) - decided exactly from carried state + the referee; tie-safe by construction (tests the fact, not parities)
definitions_frozen.ANCESTRY: transitive over the computation DAG; closure(R) = nodes with at least one ancestor in R (strict)
definitions_frozen.DEVIATES: BRIEF-VERBATIM (account form; Will's transcription-fidelity ruling 2026-06-11): a node DEVIATES at step q iff its ACCOUNT fails the free Law at that step - e'_{q+1} != e_q - (u_q/2)*D(t_q), decided exactly as NOT[ RN_{q+1}(x'_n) - RN_{q+1}(x_n) == x'_n - x_n ] with RN_{q+1}(x_n) supplied by the free-law-advanced reading (Stage-A-certified equal).
definitions_frozen.REFLECTS: node n reflects at step q iff its own |t_q| > 1/4 (equivalently D != 0 under the Law's D; |t|=1/4 ties give D=0 and do NOT reflect)
definitions_frozen.interacting_semantics: x_n(q) = op(parent READINGS at q); leaves are exact float64 dyadics (L <= 53), so leaf accounts are 0 for q >= 53 and leaves never reflect; sqrt-node children consume the sqrt READING (dyadic), keeping all non-sqrt phenomena rational

determinism: fixtures literal/pinned; zero RNG; byte-stable; any FAIL stops the stage for Will.

fixtures.i_route_pair: the bigraded Stage-C route-pair battery REUSED under its existing pin a369d82eb46d1430 (35 operand pairs; routes A=(a-b)*(a+b), B=a^2-b^2)

ii_f1a_prefix.note: FENCE-3 ADAPTATION (recorded): the HR131 kappa route's transcendental tail (log/exp2/pow) is excluded by brief fence 3 (rational core + sqrt only); the fixture is the route's rational+sqrt prefix at the 16 pinned rungs: v1=1/r, v2=2*v1, v3=1-v2, v4=sqrt(v3), v5=v4*v4 (depth 5).

grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.C-P3_reconstruction: topo pass AT q+1 WITHOUT graph re-execution: each parent's q+1 reading advanced by the LAW from carried (s, x-binade, t-class) where its own phenomenon is unshifted, else taken from the already-reconstructed value; each node's shifted intermediate x'_n built by op algebra on reconstructed parent readings; e-hat(q+1) = x'_n - RN_{q+1}(x'_n) by the REFEREE. Asserted == the walker's independently-measured (x', s) pair, exact structural equality (sqrt nodes compared as (radicand, s) pairs). Per-op formulas are the Law (authority section 1) + op algebra; cited.
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.sqrt_commutation_compare: for sqrt nodes, e' == e <=> sqrt(R') - sqrt(R) == s' - s, decided exactly: sqrt(R') == sqrt(R) + c <=> (R' - R - c^2)/(2c) == sqrt(R), a rational-vs-sqrt comparison (c = s'-s rational, c != 0 cases only; c = 0 => requires R' == R). Derived; cited to the Phen comparator machinery (Stage A).
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.walker: per fixture, per q: topo pass computes x_n(q) from parent readings (exact Q; sqrt nodes as exact-sqrt phenomena over rational radicands), s_n(q) by the referee, reflection flags by exact |e| vs u/4 comparison (Stage-A law_d).

object: the interacting flow on graphs (Amendment 2: absorption discovered pre-freeze)
observational: reflection densities per node/step; propagation-depth histograms; absorption statistics (counts, locations, additive-vs-multiplicative split); per-fixture flow timelines - OBSERVATIONAL, ungraded, separator-M3 raw material.

predictions_verbatim_from_brief_amendmen.C-P1prime: at every node and every step on every fixture: free-Law deviation ==> at least one ancestor of that node reflected at that step. Equivalently: no ancestor reflected ==> the free Law holds.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief_amendmen.C-P2prime: at every step, the set of deviating nodes EQUALS { n in the descendant-closure of the reflecting set : RN_{q+1}(x'_n) - RN_{q+1}(x_n) != x'_n - x_n }. Set equality, both inclusions graded; containment of the deviating set in the closure follows and is graded en route.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief_amendmen.C-P3: for every deviating node at every step, the actual e_{q+1} is reproduced EXACTLY from: the step-q carried state (all node readings + accounts), the Refinement Law, and reference-rounding of the exactly-computed shifted intermediates - with ZERO re-execution of the computation at q+1.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief_amendmen.C-P4: at every closure-node where the commutation criterion marks ABSORBED, the free-Law verdict HOLDS exactly - the screened interaction leaves no trace in the account.
